# selah

> Pause. Reflect. Grow. — Faith-based web tools for deeper Bible engagement.

## Bible Scribe

A meditative scripture transcription tool. Type the Bible verse by verse in 32 translations across 7 languages (English, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Japanese).

- Sequential mode: transcribe chapter by chapter
- Random mode: curated passages for reflection
- Bookmarks and progress tracking
- Meditative typing sounds
- Offline support via IndexedDB
- Dark mode
- Free, no signup required

URL: https://selah-alpha.vercel.app/bible-scribe

## More Info

- [Full details](https://selah-alpha.vercel.app/llms-full.txt)
